title: Hi Inspectability
description: Forge 1.20.1 Inspectability,it is a mod that allows players to inspect item models in-game, providing a closer and detailed view of the item's appearance.
body:
# Inspectability-Forge

![a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/897b41c191db208957f2d4bfeaee0af7e460d30b.gif)

This mod is a Forge version of [Inspectability](https://modrinth.com/mod/inspectability) and follows the MIT license.

## Changes
1.Added the functionality to exit the 3D inspector screen by pressing any key.

2.Hide the crosshair when the 3D inspector screen is open.
